description_long: This is a heavily armed, futuristic military aircraft with a robust, angular fuselage painted in olive green and white. The vehicle features two large jet engines mounted on top of the wings, which are swept back and adorned with stylized white wing insignias. The cockpit is situated at the front, with a clear canopy and visible yellow markings on the nose. Multiple weapon hardpoints are visible under the wings, including missile pods and gun barrels, indicating its combat role. The tail section is reinforced with a horizontal stabilizer and vertical fin, and the vehicle displays various military markings, including the word 'CADIA' and the number '69'. The overall design suggests a focus on durability, firepower, and rapid deployment in urban or battlefield environments.
description: A futuristic, olive green and white military aircraft with twin top-mounted engines, visible weapon mounts, and prominent military insignia.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular nose, cockpit canopy, twin engines, and forward-facing weapon mounts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'CADIA' marking, number '69', wing insignia, and the full length of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the twin engines, full wingspan with weapon pods, and the symmetrical layout of the vehicle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible markings, wing insignia, and the structure of the tail and engines.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four visible weapon mounts: two under each wing, equipped with missile pods and gun barrels.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with angular, reinforced panels covering the fuselage, wings, and cockpit; appears thick and robust.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive green with large white stylized wing insignias and some gray and yellow accent markings.
attribute_military_markings: White 'CADIA' text and number '69' on both sides of the fuselage; white wing insignias on both wings; small roundel near cockpit.
